mapper.select: SELECT TOP 1 CONVERT(INT, ID) FROM NetWork WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(SLNO)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(#{slno,jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ORDER BY ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NetWork (SLNO, ONLINE, ISDELETED, DeviceName, Status_Upd_on) SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(#{slno,jdbcType=VARCHAR})), CONVERT(BIT, 1), CONVERT(BIT, 0), LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(#{slno,jdbcType=VARCHAR})), 20), GETDATE() WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NetWork WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(SLNO)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(#{slno,jdbcType=VARCHAR})) )
